headline: Aon PLC (AON) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth and Strategic Capital ...
summary: Aon PLC (AON) reports robust financial performance with a 14% increase in adjusted EPS and a significant dividend boost, despite facing global challenges.
